---
title: " "
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.hero {
  padding: 80px 0 60px 0;
  text-align: center;
}
.hero h1 {
  font-size: 3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
.hero .tagline {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: #6c757d;
  margin-bottom: 1.5em;
}
.hero .links a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0 8px;
  padding: 10px 22px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}
.hero .links a:hover { opacity: 0.8; }
.btn-primary { background: #0d6efd; color: #fff !important; }
.btn-outline { border: 1.5px solid #0d6efd; color: #0d6efd !important; }

.section { padding: 50px 0 30px 0; }
.section h2 { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.8em; border-bottom: 2px solid #e9ecef; padding-bottom: 0.4em; }

.skills-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 1em;
}
.skill-tag {
  background: #f0f4ff;
  color: #0d6efd;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 5px 16px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.project-card {
  border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s;
}
.project-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
.project-card h3 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; }
.project-card p { color: #6c757d; margin-bottom: 0.8em; font-size: 0.95rem; }
.project-card a { font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; }
</style>

<div class="hero">
  <h1>Simon Feinermann</h1>
  <div class="tagline">BSc Computational Business Analytics · Frankfurt School of Finance & Management · Frankfurt</div>
  <div class="links">
    <a href="mailto:simon-feinermann@gmx.de" class="btn-primary">Get in touch</a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/simon-feinermann" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/simoncan10" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">GitHub</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About

I'm a **BSc Computational Business Analytics** student at the [Frankfurt School of Finance & Management](https://www.frankfurt-school.de/en/home/study/bachelor/bachelor-science/bachelor-computational-business-analytics) — a program combining rigorous data science with deep business and finance expertise.

My coursework spans machine learning, statistics, SQL, and databases on the technical side, alongside corporate finance, derivatives (Futures & Options), accounting, business valuation, and operations management on the business side. Outside of my degree I self-study ML engineering and apply what I learn to real-world datasets.

My goal is to become the kind of analyst who can both build the model and understand what it means for the business — and eventually turn that expertise into my own venture.

I'm currently looking for **internships** in data science, quantitative finance, or ML engineering.

---

## Skills

```{=html}
<div class="skills-grid">
  <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">scikit-learn</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">pandas</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">NumPy</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Databases</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Feature Engineering</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Machine Learning</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Statistics</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Corporate Finance</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Business Valuation</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Futures & Options</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Accounting</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Operations Management</span>
</div>
```

---

## Projects

```{=html}
<div class="project-card">
  <h3>Home Credit Default Risk</h3>
  <p>End-to-end machine learning project on the Kaggle Home Credit competition — predicting loan default probability from complex real-world financial data. Covers EDA, custom sklearn pipelines, feature engineering, and random forest modelling.</p>
  <a href="home-credit-default-risk/notebooks/home_credit_default_risk.html">View analysis →</a> &nbsp;
  <a href="home-credit-default-risk/notebooks/home_credit_pipeline.html">View pipeline →</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3>Hands-On Machine Learning — Study Notebooks</h3>
  <p>Working through Aurélien Géron's <em>Hands-On Machine Learning</em>, implementing end-to-end ML workflows and classification techniques from scratch.</p>
  <a href="Hands-On Machine Learning A.G/Chapter 2/02_end_to_end_machine_learning_project.html">Ch.2 End-to-End ML →</a> &nbsp;
  <a href="Hands-On Machine Learning A.G/Chapter 3/03_classification.html">Ch.3 Classification →</a>
</div>
```

---

## Contact

Open to internship opportunities, collaborations, or just a conversation about ML and finance.

- **Email:** [simon-feinermann@gmx.de](mailto:simon-feinermann@gmx.de)
- **LinkedIn:** [simon-feinermann](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simon-feinermann)
- **GitHub:** [simoncan10](https://github.com/simoncan10)
- **Location:** Bad Homburg / Frankfurt, Germany
